mapper.sql: id, name, description, status, priority, start_date, end_date, progress, owner_id, created_by, color, dept_code, needs_handover, previous_owner_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_project ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_project WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_project WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT p. FROM sys_project p INNER JOIN sys_project_member pm ON p.id = pm.project_id WHERE pm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_project (id, name, description, status, priority, start_date, end_date, progress, owner_id, created_by, color, dept_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{progress}, #{ownerId}, #{createdBy}, #{color}, #{deptCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_project
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_project WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT id FROM sys_project WHERE JSON_CONTAINS( (SELECT managed_project_ids FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId}), JSON_QUOTE(id) ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_project WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled') AND needs_handover = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM sys_project WHERE needs_handover = 1 AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled')
AND dept_code IN
#{dc}
AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, status, dept_code AS deptCode, previous_owner_id AS previousOwnerId, needs_handover AS needsHandover FROM sys_project WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled') AND needs_handover = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_project WHERE dept_code = #{deptCode} AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled') AND needs_handover = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_project SET dept_code = #{newCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dept_code = #{oldCode} AND status NOT IN ('completed','cancelled') AND needs_handover = 0
